pick_entry: pick an entry in the scan log to see details
no_scan: no scans yet. edit any code file → auto-scan runs.
clear: ✓ CLEAR — no findings in this run
aud_summary: active scanners · static auditors + trivy (CVE / secret / IaC)
f_target_hint: host / URL / IP — must be in allowlist scope
no_exec: No tools in the exec allowlist — add one to the allowlist first.
